days.title: Arrival in Bali
days.subtitle: Embrace the tropical paradise
localTips: Purchase a local SIM card at the airport for easy connectivity.
Negotiate taxi fares before getting in — or use Grab for rides.
Try to eat at Warung-style restaurants for authentic Balinese cuisine.

days.title: Exploring Ubud
days.subtitle: Culture and Culinary Delights

timeline.title: Breakfast at Hotel
timeline.detail: Start your day with a delicious breakfast at Bali Niksoma Boutique Beach Resort. Enjoy a variety of local and international dishes that cater to everyone's taste buds. Savor some traditional Balinese coffee paired with tropical fruits and pastries while enjoying the beautiful view.
timeline.mapQuery: Bali Niksoma Boutique Beach Resort, Bali

timeline.title: Visit Tegalalang Rice Terrace
timeline.detail: Explore the stunning Tegalalang Rice Terrace, a UNESCO World Heritage site known for its breathtaking views and intricate irrigation system. Take a leisurely walk through the terraces and immerse yourself in the local agriculture and culture, capturing the vibrant greens and unique landscapes.

timeline.title: 📸 Photospot: Tegalalang’s Best Viewpoint
timeline.detail: This viewpoint offers a panoramic view of the rice terraces, ideal for photography enthusiasts. Capture the layers of rice paddies and the lush jungle backdrop that surrounds them, making for a perfect vacation shot.
timeline.mapQuery: Tegalalang Rice Terrace viewpoint, Ubud, Bali
timeline.tip: Best angle: stand at the edge of the viewpoint. Shoot toward the golden rice fields. Best light: golden hour or morning light enhances the greens.

timeline.title: Lunch at Local Warung
timeline.detail: Enjoy an authentic Balinese lunch at a nearby warung, known for its traditional dishes like Nasi Goreng and Sate. This local eatery boasts a cozy atmosphere and is popular among both locals and tourists. Try their delicious homemade desserts for a sweet finish.

timeline.title: Ubud Cooking Class
timeline.detail: Join a cooking class in Ubud where you will learn to prepare traditional Balinese dishes from a local chef. This hands-on experience will teach you about the ingredients and spices unique to Balinese cuisine while allowing you to enjoy the meal you've created.

timeline.title: Relaxing Break at Hotel
timeline.detail: Return to Bali Niksoma Boutique Beach Resort for some relaxation and downtime after an eventful day. Take a dip in the pool or unwind with a book in the tranquil surroundings while soaking in the warm Balinese atmosphere.
timeline.mapQuery: Bali Niksoma Boutique Beach Resort, Bali

timeline.title: Dinner at Hotel Restaurant
timeline.detail: Conclude your day with a delightful dinner at the hotel's restaurant. Indulge in a fusion of local and international flavors, with an emphasis on fresh seafood and organic ingredients, all while enjoying stunning views of the sunset over the beach.
timeline.mapQuery: Bali Niksoma Boutique Beach Resort, Bali

timeline.title: Evening Stroll on the Beach
timeline.detail: Take a peaceful evening stroll along the nearby beach to enjoy the cool breeze and the sound of waves crashing. This is a perfect opportunity to reflect on the day's adventures while soaking in the serene beauty of Bali.

timeline.title: Rest at Hotel
timeline.detail: After an enjoyable day exploring Ubud and experiencing its culinary delights, head back to your room for a restful night’s sleep at Bali Niksoma Boutique Beach Resort. Prepare for another exciting day in beautiful Bali tomorrow.
timeline.mapQuery: Bali Niksoma Boutique Beach Resort, Bali

localTips: Book your cooking class in advance to ensure a spot.
Rent a scooter to explore nearby villages for hidden gems.
Visit the Ubud Art Market early to avoid crowds.

days.title: Departure from Bali
days.subtitle: Final moments in paradise

timeline.title: Check-out from Bali Niksoma Boutique Beach Resort
timeline.detail: Enjoy a leisurely breakfast one last time at the hotel before checking out. Ensure you settle any outstanding bills and confirm your airport transfer.
timeline.mapQuery: Bali Niksoma Boutique Beach Resort, Bali, Indonesia

timeline.title: Breakfast at La Baracca
timeline.detail: Savor a delicious Italian breakfast at La Baracca. The place is known for its fresh ingredients and extensive menu. Don't miss their signature breakfast pizza.

timeline.title: Last Minute Shopping at Seminyak Square
timeline.detail: Explore the shops at Seminyak Square for souvenirs, local crafts, and fashion items. This bustling area is perfect for acquiring unique gifts to remember your Bali trip.

timeline.title: 📸 Photospot: Seminyak Beach Sunset
timeline.detail: Capture the stunning sunsets at Seminyak Beach. The blend of colors and silhouettes of palm trees create a perfect shot to take home.
timeline.tip: Best angle: stand near the shoreline. Shoot toward the horizon. Best light: golden hour just before sunset. Include beachgoers in the foreground for context.

timeline.title: Lunch at Warung Made
timeline.detail: Enjoy a traditional Balinese lunch at Warung Made, well-known for its local recipes and authentic atmosphere. The Nasi Goreng and Satay are highly recommended.

timeline.title: Beachside Relaxation at Double Six Beach
timeline.detail: Spend some time relaxing at Double Six Beach. You can rent a sunbed, enjoy a refreshing beverage, and just soak in the serene atmosphere one last time.
timeline.mapQuery: Double Six Beach, Seminyak, Bali, Indonesia

timeline.title: Transfer to Ngurah Rai International Airport
timeline.detail: After your relaxing beach time, your pre-booked transport will take you to Ngurah Rai International Airport. Ensure you arrive with enough time to check in and pass through security.
timeline.mapQuery: Ngurah Rai International Airport, Bali, Indonesia

timeline.title: Arrival at Ngurah Rai International Airport
timeline.detail: Check in for your flight and prepare for departure. Grab a snack or last-minute souvenir at the airport shops before your flight home.
timeline.mapQuery: Ngurah Rai International Airport, Bali, Indonesia

localTips: Allow extra time for airport check-in, especially if you have goods to declare.
Visit local cafes for a final taste of Bali before your flight.
Check for the best views of the sunset at a beachside bar.

hotels.name: Bali Niksoma Boutique Beach Resort
hotels.note: Located near the beach, with great view and pool
hotels.address: Jalan Padma No. 2, Legian Beach, Bali, Indonesia

urgent.label: Reserve Bali Niksoma
urgent.note: This hotel fills quickly, ensure your stay
